instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall perform upshift when engine speed exceeds the calibrated threshold.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall command upshift when Engine_Speed exceeds Upshift_RPM.

expected_output: IF Engine_Speed > Upshift_RPM THEN Shift_Command = Upshift

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall allow upshift when vehicle speed exceeds the calibrated speed limit.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall permit upshift when Vehicle_Speed exceeds Upshift_Speed.

expected_output: IF Vehicle_Speed > Upshift_Speed THEN Shift_Command = Upshift

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall perform upshift during low throttle cruising conditions.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall command upshift when throttle demand is below Throttle_Limit and engine speed exceeds the upshift threshold.

expected_output: IF Engine_Speed > Upshift_RPM AND Throttle_Position < Throttle_Limit THEN Shift_Command = Upshift
